scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/daemon && npm run build:daemon-bundle
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test packages/daemon/test/*.test.mjs && npm run validate:dtos
scripts.test:adapter-sdk: npm run build -w packages/daemon && node --test packages/adapter-sdk/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.stress:workflow: npm run build -w packages/daemon && node scripts/stress-workflow.mjs
scripts.gen:dtos: npm run build -w packages/daemon && node scripts/generate-csharp-dtos.mjs
scripts.validate:dtos: npm run build -w packages/daemon && node scripts/generate-csharp-dtos.mjs --check
